subcodes.first_line: This is the Day which hath been mentioned in all the Books and Scriptures by the Most Exalted Pen and in the Crimson Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یومیست که در جمیع کتب و صحف ذکرش از قلم اعلی نازل و در صحیفه حمراء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
